name: A Formally Grounded ODRL Evaluator: Implementation and Comparison
summary: arXiv:2607.15987v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The ODRL policy language is emerging as the de-facto standard for policy modelling data access and usage preferences, AI governance policies and data...
description: arXiv:2607.15987v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The ODRL policy language is emerging as the de-facto standard for policy modelling data access and usage preferences, AI governance policies and data workflows in European dataspaces. The current standard has no mathematical formal semantics to describe how a system should implement policy evaluation. This has resulted in a variety of systems and...
author: Jaime Osvaldo Salas, Paolo Pareti, Adeel Aslam, Christopher Maidens, George Konstantinidis
